title: The King of Oudh's Estate Act, 1888
full_text: The King of Oudh's Estate Act, 1888 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 188814 Act Number: 14 Enactment Date: 1888-10-26 Act Year: 1888 Short Title: The King of Oudh's Estate Act, 1888 Long Title: An Act to make further provision for the Administration of the Estate of His late Majesty the King of Oudh. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of States TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The King of Oudh's Estate Act, 1888 Show all section Section 1. Transfers of property by and to the Agent to the Governor General in Council, and institution of legal proceedings by him. Section 2. Consequences ensuring on death, resignation or removal Agent.
